calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day in Dept. 501-A, JPT. Susan Lew, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Plaintiff, Arti Denterlein and Defendant, Adelina Castillo is present in pro per.
Parties met in 501-A and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows: Stipulation for entry of judgment.
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution of the premises at: 2338 26th Ave., San Francisco, CA.
Defendant shall vacate the premises on or before June 14, 2003, back rent of Defendant's portion in the amount of $3,116.61 to be paid in monthly installment of $200.00 starting on July 15, 2003 and on the 15th of each month there after until paid in full. Security deposit and interest will be applied toward back rent and damages.
Defendant is the sole occupant of the premises and no other person claims a right to possession. Defendant agreed to remove the dead avocado tree trunk, replace front lawn with black tarp, rocks and bricks by June 28, 2003. Pay the garbage bill by July 31, 2003.
Parties release each other from all claims, plaintiff is dismissing the other 3 defendants in this action, dismissal the action with prejudice within 5 days after defendant vacated.
Each side to bear own fees and costs.
All parties agreed to and signed the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
